Written Offer of Source Code (GNU GPL v2, Section 3)
====================================================

The program "pj-raster-helper" distributed in this directory is licensed under
the GNU General Public License, version 2 (see the accompanying file COPYING).
It is built from, and statically links, the doomgeneric engine (GPLv2).

PlotJuggler itself does NOT link this program. "pj-raster-helper" is a separate
executable that PlotJuggler launches as a child process and communicates with
over shared-memory IPC. It is distributed here as an aggregate ("mere
aggregation" in the words of the GPL); only this program and the libraries it
links are covered by the GPL.

Complete corresponding source
-----------------------------

The complete corresponding source code for the "pj-raster-helper" binary:

  - The IPC shim and build files (the helper itself) and the shared wire-protocol
    header live in the PlotJuggler/PJ4 source repository, at the revision from
    which the binary was built:

        https://github.com/PlotJuggler/PJ4
        (raster_helper/ and raster_ipc/RasterIpcProtocol.h)

  - The rendering engine is the doomgeneric project, included as a git submodule
    at 3rdparty/doomgeneric and pinned to commit

        dcb7a8dbc7a16ce3dda29382ac9aae9d77d21284

    of its upstream repository:

        https://github.com/ozkl/doomgeneric

    Running `git submodule update --init 3rdparty/doomgeneric` fetches the exact
    engine source at that commit.

To build the binary, initialize the submodule and configure the repository with
CMake; the "pj-raster-helper" target produces this executable (Qt6 Core/Network
plus the doomgeneric sources).

Offer
-----

For a period of three (3) years from the date you received this binary, the
distributor will, on request, provide a complete machine-readable copy of the
corresponding source code on a physical medium, for no more than the cost of
physically performing the distribution. To request it, open an issue at
https://github.com/PlotJuggler/PJ4 or contact the PlotJuggler maintainers.

This offer is valid to anyone who receives this binary.
